hero.title: Booking Platform App
hero.description: A structured simulation of a real-world booking platform, designed to replicate product-level frontend challenges.

phases.name: Search & Filtering
phases.goal: Implement URL-driven filtering architecture with controlled inputs and structured state management.

phases.name: Availability Calendar
phases.goal: Develop an interactive calendar component for selecting check-in and check-out dates, integrated with URL state management.

phases.name: Pricing Engine
phases.goal: Create a dynamic pricing engine that calculates hotel prices based on user-selected criteria and updates the URL accordingly.

phases.name: Multi-Step Booking Flow
phases.goal: Design and implement a multi-step booking process that guides users through hotel selection, date picking, and price confirmation, with state reflected in the URL.

phases.name: Payment Simulation
phases.goal: Simulate payment processing to ensure the booking flow handles transactions correctly(Stripe integration).
